overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a neon-lit urban plaza at night before entering a futuristic bar. The character walks around a circular outdoor bar with purple neon lighting, then transitions indoors to explore a dimly lit cyberpunk bar with teal neon accents, digital advertisements, and vending machines.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban plaza with circular outdoor bar

agents.ego_description: walking around the curved outdoor bar counter, observing the neon-lit plaza environment

notable_agents.action: person standing at the outdoor bar counter

entered.detail: curved white counter with glowing purple neon lights underneath, wrapping around a central tree
tall building-mounted screen displaying checkered pink and blue pattern
multi-story modern building with illuminated windows and signage
large trees growing through the plaza center, decorated with hanging lights
shiny wet ground surface reflecting the neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic urban plaza at night, circling around a prominent curved outdoor bar with purple neon underlighting. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon signs and digital billboards covering the surrounding glass buildings, while sparse pedestrians stand near the bar area.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar entrance transition from outdoor plaza

events.description: character walks through automatic glass doors, transitioning from outdoor plaza to indoor bar
ambient lighting shifts from open-air purple neon to enclosed teal and cyan interior lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the bar through glass doors, moving from the plaza into the interior

entered.detail: automatic sliding glass doors with teal neon framing marking the bar entrance
horizontal teal neon light strips running along the ceiling
illuminated signage above the inner doorway

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the outdoor plaza and enters a futuristic bar through automatic glass doors. The environment transitions from the open wet pavement to an enclosed space with teal neon ceiling strips and polished floors, marking the shift from exterior to interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar main floor with digital advertisements and seating

events.description: character turns slightly left to navigate around high-top tables and seated patrons

agents.ego_description: walking through the main bar area past patrons seated at tables and the central counter

notable_agents.action: two patrons sitting at a high table looking at their phones

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement showing a figure with 'JINGUJI' branding in a decorative neon frame
long black bar counter with neon signage above displaying 'WAGAMAMA'
tall round tables with stools scattered throughout the seating area
continuous strips of cyan neon lighting running along the ceiling edges

segments.scene_description: Inside the cyberpunk bar, the character moves past the JINGUJI digital poster and navigates around high-top tables where patrons sit using their phones. The space features teal neon ceiling strips, a prominent bar counter with glowing signage, and a moderate crowd of NPCs socializing and drinking.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridor with vending machines and restroom entrance

events.description: character slows and approaches the restroom doors at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back of the bar past vending machines and approaching the restroom area

notable_agents.action: security guard standing near the nCola vending machines

entered.detail: pair of bright illuminated vending machines displaying 'nCOLA' branding and beverage options
dark doors with horizontal neon light strips indicating restroom entrance
vertical digital advertisement showing a hand with the text 'DYNALAR IT'S ALL ABOUT THE TOUCH'

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a narrower back corridor of the bar, passing the Dynalar digital poster and approaching glowing nCola vending machines. The lighting becomes dimmer and more focused on specific neon accents, with a security guard standing near the machines as the character heads toward the restroom doors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, rain-slicked urban plaza into the moody, neon-lit depths of a futuristic bar. It begins by circling a curved outdoor bar with purple underlighting, where the wet pavement reflects the glow of surrounding digital billboards and glass skyscrapers. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the open exterior to an enclosed interior through automatic glass doors, transitioning the lighting from purple hues to sharp teal neon ceiling strips. The camera then navigates through the main lounge past a JINGUJI digital poster and socializing patrons before turning toward a narrower back corridor. Finally, the environment becomes dimmer and more secluded, passing a Dynalar poster and glowing nCola vending machines toward the restroom doors.
